name: Stuffed Crust Pepperoni Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Grease a 13x9 inch pan. Unroll the dough and press it into the bottom and up the sides of the greased pan. Place pieces of string cheese along the inside edges of the dough. Fold the dough over and around the cheese, pressing the dough edges together to seal. Top the crust with sauce, pepperoni, and cheese.
2. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 15 to 18 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted. Makes 6 servings.
